{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Stellar Spear
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Path of the Stellar Spear Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Path]] of the [[Stellar Spear]] is a sacred art characterized by light-aspected combat techniques that utilize spear-based movements. It is the signature [[Path]] of the [[Jai clan]], a family of [[sacred artists]] that once unified the [[Desolate Wilds]] through violent rule. The [[Path]]'s [[madra]] is a combination of light and [[sword]] aspects, often manifesting as silver-white or starlight-colored energy. Practitioners of this [[Path]] exhibit a distinct physical [[Goldsign]] in the form of metallic hair that reflects light. The [[Path]] features various specialized techniques, including [[Striker]] moves like the [[Star Lance]] and [[Enforcer]] abilities such as [[Star]]’s Edge, which reinforces a weapon rather than the user's body. Advanced combat maneuvers include the [[Fall of Seven Stars]] and the [[Nightstone Spear Formation]]. While the original version of the [[Path]] is considered highly potent, a branch known as the [[Path of the Broken Star]] exists, and some members of the [[Jai clan]] have been exiled for practicing a twisted version of these arts. Historically, the [[Path]] is associated with the [[Ancestor's Spear]], a powerful weapon formed from [[madra]] and etched with [[scripts]]. Additionally, the [[Path]] is linked to [[Stellar Spear Remnants]], which appear as bony, starlight-sketched figures.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path]] of the [[Stellar Spear]] is a specialized path utilized by members of the [[Jai clan]]. This progression features specific Goldsigns and remains an option available to artists. One such [[Goldsign]] within the path consists of frozen hair.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] consists of blood members of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] is a path that features specific Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] is a path used by the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] is a path available to artists.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] has a [[Goldsign]] consisting of frozen hair.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] is a path from which a true heir can be raised.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] is a path associated with shiny metallic hair.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Daishou]] was enlightened when he visited the birthplace of the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
